sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33666" key="e)lefanto/xrws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλεφαντό-χρως</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-χρωτος</foreign>, <sense id="n33666.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ivory-coloured</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀδόντες</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
